response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the provided lyrics for the two main songs. The intro sequence (00:00-00:06) contains the conclusion of a previous song not included in the JSON and was manually transcribed. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for 'The Delicious Way to Cook Rice' and 'Homesick Pt.2&3', with manual transcription filling gaps in the intro and outro. 3. Timing & Pacing: Applied aggressive truncation and instantaneous transitions to keep pace with the rapid-fire instructions in the rice-cooking song. Maintained melodic phrasing for the smoother tempo of the second track.

subtitles.english: To the Japanese archipelago that copulates thoroughly,

subtitles.original: そんなそんなそんな調子
subtitles.english: Like that, like that, like that pace,

subtitles.original: ぶち壊していくぜ 見本通りだば

subtitles.original: OKOME! おこめこめ RICE!
subtitles.english: OKOME! Rice, rice, RICE!

subtitles.original: SUPER POWER RELAXATION
subtitles.english: SUPER POWER RELAXATION

subtitles.original: 1合150CC 正確無比に計ること
subtitles.english: 1 cup, 150cc—measure it with zero errors.

subtitles.original: 次に洗いだが直接米にお水をあてず二本指で
subtitles.english: Next is washing; don't pour water directly, use two fingers.

subtitles.original: お水を計りJOIN!するのだが その量米の1.2倍
subtitles.english: Measure the water and JOIN! Set it to 1.2 times the rice.

subtitles.original: その後は二時間ほどサディスティック(!)に お水に浸して
subtitles.english: Then soak it for two hours... sadistically(!)

subtitles.original: ジャーの電源ON！
subtitles.english: Rice cooker power ON!

subtitles.original: 陽炎のようなスチーム
subtitles.english: Steam rising like a heat haze.

subtitles.original: 底からかき混ぜて THE TIMING IS RIPE!
subtitles.english: Stir from the bottom, THE TIMING IS RIPE!

subtitles.original: おこめ おこめこめ ビタミン ミネラル 食物繊維
subtitles.english: Rice, rice, rice, rice. Vitamins, minerals, dietary fiber.

subtitles.original: おこめこめ おこめこめ
subtitles.english: Rice, rice, rice, rice, rice, rice.

subtitles.original: 食べて どすこい＆どすこい おこめ おこめこめ
subtitles.english: Eat and shout 'Dosukoi!' Rice, rice, rice, rice.

subtitles.original: おすもうさんのPowerをGET おこめこめ おこめこめ
subtitles.english: Get the power of a sumo wrestler! Rice, rice, rice, rice.

subtitles.original: ああ 抱いて ロマンティックに NIGHT FLIGHT
subtitles.english: Ah, hold me romantically on this NIGHT FLIGHT.

subtitles.original: おこめ おこめこめ 米屋のあの子をたぶらかそう！
subtitles.english: Rice, rice, rice, rice. Let's seduce that rice shop girl!

subtitles.original: (GENIUS) 炊きほうだい
subtitles.english: (GENIUS) Cook all you want.

subtitles.original: (SEXY) 食べほうだい
subtitles.english: (SEXY) Eat all you want.

subtitles.original: (THRILLING) YEAH SO I LOVE YOU
subtitles.english: (THRILLING) YEAH SO I LOVE YOU!

subtitles.original: おこめ おこめこめ SUPER ENERGY MIRACLE POWER
subtitles.english: Rice, rice, rice, rice. SUPER ENERGY MIRACLE POWER!

subtitles.original: おこめこめ おこめこめ ああん おこめ
subtitles.english: Rice, rice, rice, rice. Aahn, rice...

subtitles.original: おこめおいしい
subtitles.english: Rice is delicious.

subtitles.original: 真昼と真夜中の間に立つ歌は
subtitles.english: The song that stands between midday and midnight...

subtitles.original: 真っ白なゲームといって耳もとではしゃぐ
subtitles.english: is a pure white game frolicking by your ear.

subtitles.original: パーフェクト僕らは完璧...なんて軽い冗談だった
subtitles.english: Perfect, we are perfect... what a simple joke that was.

subtitles.original: いつも答えは127の項目
subtitles.english: The answer is always among 127 items.

subtitles.original: アスファルト蹴りあげたらトランプで決めて
subtitles.english: After kicking up the asphalt, decide it with cards.

subtitles.original: 急ぎ足で駆け出すのさ 今すぐバスで
subtitles.english: Run off with a brisk pace, take the bus right now.

subtitles.original: そしてホームシック抱えながら人々は目指す
subtitles.english: And while carrying homesickness, people aim ahead.

subtitles.original: 行き先はスマートに決めて 願いを叶えたいのなら
subtitles.english: Choose your destination smartly, if you want your wish granted.

subtitles.original: 真夏と真冬の間に生まれた歌は
subtitles.english: The song born between midsummer and midwinter...

subtitles.original: まったりなカーブ描いてどこまでも進む
subtitles.english: draws a relaxed curve and goes ahead anywhere.

subtitles.original: パーフェクト全ては同じ...似たもの同士だった
subtitles.english: Perfect, everything's the same... we were like-minded.

subtitles.original: いつも答えは同じ音なんだ
subtitles.english: The answer is always the same sound.

subtitles.original: ソフトロックで暴れたら
subtitles.english: If you go wild with soft rock,

subtitles.original: トークバックで yeah!
subtitles.english: then talk back, yeah!

subtitles.original: 差し出したルール 12月のスポーツ
subtitles.english: The rules held out, December's sports.

subtitles.original: バジルパスタの試食
subtitles.english: Tasting basil pasta.

subtitles.original: 明日の噂話をトランクに詰めて
subtitles.english: Packing tomorrow's gossip into the trunk.

subtitles.original: 逆回しでやり直すのさ 悪い性格
subtitles.english: Starting over in reverse—it's a bad personality.

subtitles.original: それでホームシック語りながら人々は祈る
subtitles.english: Talking of being homesick, people offer their prayers.

subtitles.original: 行先は満ちあふれてる 誰かが待ちわびるから
subtitles.english: Destinations are overflowing, for someone is waiting.
